sections.title: YouKnow
sections.subtitle: Not answers. An analyst.
sections.body: Everyone is building AI that queries data. We're building the analyst you always wished you had.

sections.label: The gap
sections.headline: AI gives you answers. Business needs decisions.
sections.body: Tools query. Analysts think. That's the gap we close.

sections.headline: A team of analysts, not a chatbot
sections.body: Challenges assumptions. Asks the right questions. Refines the problem until it's actionable.

sections.headline: From data to impact. The full loop.
sections.body: Analysis that doesn't lead to action is not enough.

sections.headline: Connected to real systems, not just the warehouse
sections.body: Meta, Google, tracking, BI — cross-referenced. Knows the difference between a real issue and a measurement problem.

sections.headline: Built for how data actually breaks
sections.body: Detects bias. Flags unreliable sources. Recommends how to fix measurement, not just performance.

sections.headline: Full memory. Total context.
sections.body: Past insights, campaigns, launches, known issues — it remembers what happened and why.

sections.headline: Doesn't wait to be asked
sections.body: Detects anomalies. Surfaces opportunities. Pushes insights to the right people.

sections.headline: Speaks your language
sections.body: Custom metrics. Your definitions. Your goals. Not generic dashboards.

sections.headline: Joins your team
sections.body: Onboards into your business. Works with everyone — not just analysts.

sections.headline: Why we win
sections.principle: An obsession with actions that drive real impact.

sections.body: Everyone will give you AI that answers questions about data.
sections.emphasis: We give you the analyst that runs your business with it.
